description.tr: Hanbros UK knowledge base. Frequently asked questions and answers. Detailed information about our transportation services. FAQ page.
description.en: Hanbros UK knowledge base. Frequently asked questions and answers. Detailed information about our transportation services. FAQ page.

text.tr:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.

Guides summarise operational and customs flows; obtain professional advice for legal certainty.
